titleStmt.title: SII 26.533: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 533. (A.R. No. 504A of 1909.) PUDUPĀḶAIYAM, SRIVILLIPUTTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged in some places. It is a copy of No. 532 above. However, here the signatories were Pūvāṉ Āṇḍapirāṉ Aḻagaṉ alias Aḻagiyapāṇḍya Viḻupparaiyaṉ of Pokkuḷam in Arumpoṟ-kūṟṟam, Poṉpaṟṟiuḍaiyāṉ Tiruppūvaṇamuḍaiyāṉ Sundarapāṇḍyadēvaṉ alias Sundarapāṇḍya Villavarāyaṉ of Kīraṉūr and [Vi]ratamuḍittāṉ alias Pallavarājaṉ of Śakkara[pa •••••] in Śevvirukkai-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
koṉeriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ veṇpaikkuṭināṭṭuk karuṅkuḷamāṉa cātavācakanallūr pūvaṉaṅkaḷil muṭaiyāṟ koyiliṟ ḻan tiruvācalukkut teṉkiḻakkuḷak
Oruvāṟuṇarntāṉ Eṉakku nallaperumāḷāṉa tamiḻpallavaraiyaṉ perāl ceyvitta Eṉakku nallaperumāḷ maṭattu vattikkum tiru vārūr kraṣaṇa koḷakimaṭattu Ācā
san=tāṉattu tapasyaṟkum bho[ja]ṉam Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭuvaṉavukku Iccātavācakanallūr tevaṉ paracirāmaṉāṉa pāṇṭiyatevaṉukku Ivvūril melpāl karuṅkuḷattil kāṇi
taṭi Oṉṟu nilam mukkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻaraiye yaraikkālum Itaṉ kiḻakkut taṭi Oṉṟu nilam kāṇiyaraikkāṇi muntirikaikkiḻaraiye yaraikkālum Itaṉ vaṭakkuttaṭi nā
kālum Āṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟut taṭi Oṉṟu nilam kāṇi yaraikkāṇikkiḻ mukkā taṭi Oṉṟu nilam mukkāṇiyaraikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻeḻu
Ivvūr yūṟkuḷattil tevaṉ nilam Orumā muntirikaikkiḻ mukkāle mākāṇiyum muṉṟāṅkaṇṇāṟu
kkiḻaraikkālum Itaṉ vaṭakiḻakkut taṭi muṉṟu
lum Itaṉ kkut taṭi nālunilaṅkāṇi Araikkāṇik kiḻaraikkālum Āṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟut taṭi Oṉṟu nilaṅ kāṇiyaraikkāṇikkiḻ mukkālum ciṅkaḷa vayaka
ṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻeḻumāvaraiyum Āka nilam muṉṟu māmuntirikaik kiḻaraiyum Ivvūr vaṭapālātiyūṟ kuḷattil Iraṇṭāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu tevaṉ vayakkal taṭi
tirikaikkiḻ mukkāle mākāṇiyum muṉṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu yātavarāyaṉ ceykku vaṭakkiḻakkut taṭi Iraṇṭunilam Araikkāṇi muntirikaikkiḻ mukkālum
Itaṉ meṟku ttaṭi Iraṇṭu nilaṅkāṇiyaraikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻa raikkālum Itaṉ vaṭakiḻakkut taṭi muṉṟu nilam Araikkāṇik kiḻaraiye Araikkālum pu
kkuk kiḻak ku vākkālukkut teṟkut taṭi Oṉṟu nilam Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻ mākāṇiyum Ākanilam Iraṇṭu māvaraikkāṇik kiḻeḻumāvaraiyum Ivvūr pa
ttu mutaṟ kaṇṇāṟṟu Āṇaiyāṇṭāṉ taṭikkut teṉkiḻakkuk karuṅkuḷattukku nir pākiṟa vākkālukkuk kiḻakkum cemmoṭi vākkālukku meṟku taṭi pala nilam nālumā mukkāṇik kiḻa�
yum kaṟkayattuppaṟṟil Āṟṟukkut teṟkut toṭṭa nilam Iraṇṭumāvum Āka nilam Araiye Iraṇṭu māvum patiṉoṉvatiṉetirāmāṇṭu mutal maṭappuṟa Iṟaiyili yi
ku miṭattuk kaṭamaiyumantarāyamum viṉiyokamun taruvatāṉa Accuṅ kāriyavarāṭciyum veṭṭipāṭṭamum pañcupili cantuvikkirakappeṟum vācalpeṟum Ilāñciṉaippeṟum
peṟpaṭṭaṉavum Uṭpaṭa māttāl kācu kālum payir pāṟtu viḷainta nilattukkuk kaṭamai māttāl Ivvūṟ kaṭamaiyiṟukkuṅkālāl nellaṟukalamum kuṟuvai viḷai
caiyal Oṉṟu mukkālum Aṟpacik kuṟuvai viḷainta nilattukku Oṉṟu pātiyuṅ tulāviṟaittu viḷainta nilattukku Oṉṟu kālum Eḷvaraku tiṉaippulliruṅku viḷainta nilat
ṇṭum Āka Ivvāṇṭu mutal Iṟuppatākavum Iṭṭavariyilār Eḻuttiṭṭa Uḷvariyum naṅkeḻviyuṅ kuṭukkac coṉṉom kaikkoṇṭu Ippaṭi candrādityavaṟ celvatā
m veṭṭikkoḷka Ivai Arumpoṟ kūṟṟattup pokkuḷattu pūvāṉ Āṇṭa pirāṉ Aḻakaṉāṉa Aḻakiya pāṇṭiya viḻupparaiyaṉeḻuttu yāṇṭu 1000 100 Ivai
ṇaṉ kiraṉūṟ poṉpaṟṟiyuṭaiyāṉ tiruppūvaṇamuṭaiyāṉ cuntarapāṇṭiyatevaṉāṉa cuntarapāṇṭiya villavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai cevvirukkaināṭṭuc cakkarapa
ratamuṭittāṉāṉa pallavarājaṉeḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 26.533 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
